statement: In every magma, Equation 2636 (`x = (y * ((z * w) * w)) * w`) implies Equation 1261 (`x = x * (((y * z) * x) * w)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0553
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op (op z w) w)) w)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op x (op (op (op y z) x) w))
